title: Aggregate Library
description: The 'lib/aggregate' directory in Hadoop MapReduce contains the ValueAggregator library. This library offers custom aggregation of map output values through dynamic loading of user-defined aggregators. It includes base classes for user-defined aggregators, a generic combiner, and a reducer. The components collaborate to provide flexible, interchangeable aggregation strategies, exemplifying the Strategy design pattern.
